title: Chapter 76
content:

The heat radiating from her body seeped into his shaft, a soothing balm after the violent friction.

His breathing slowed. As the adrenaline of the

Dragon’s Vitality finally ebbed, a rare moment of clarity washed over him.

Kai thought, his brow furrowing in the dark behind his eyelids.

I know how I am... but was that too much? I only had to fuck her pussy to complete the quest. Did I lose control of myself?

He had intended to be calculated. He had intended to use her curiosity just enough to claim the XP. But the moment he felt her incredibly tight, virgin walls—the way she screamed, the way her massive breasts felt in his hands, the way she begged him to ruin her—the beast inside him had taken over completely. He had gone feral.

A soft, trembling voice broke through his thoughts.

"Was... was I good?"

Kai opened his eyes slowly.

Yun Xi was still on her hands and knees, her head turned to the side, resting against the sweat-soaked mattress. Her glasses were completely fogged and dotted with his cum, but through the lenses, he could see the sheer vulnerability in her gaze.

"Huh?" Kai breathed, genuinely caught off guard.

"Was I good... for you, Kai?" Yun Xi whispered, her voice incredibly small, as if she were afraid of the answer. "I didn’t know what to do. I just... I hope you liked it. I hope you enjoyed it."

Kai looked down at her. He looked at the white streaks of his seed drying on her flushed cheeks, the heavy sway of her breasts beneath her, and the absolute devotion in her eyes.

"Umm... yeah," Kai said, his voice unusually soft, lacking its usual arrogant edge. "I enjoyed it, Yun Xi. It was incredible." He paused, reaching out to gently trace the curve of her waist. "And what about you?"

A slow, beautifully genuine smile spread across Yun Xi’s face. From his angle, looking down at her, the smile transformed her entire demeanor. She didn’t look like the awkward, bullied scholar anymore. She looked radiant.

"Yes..." she breathed, a tear of pure joy slipping from the corner of her eye to mix with his cum on her cheek. "It was... the best thing of my life."

Kai blinked.

He stared at that smile, a strange sensation twisting in his chest. He looked at the floating blue screen in his peripheral vision—the notification declaring the target "subjugated."

But looking at her now, Kai realized something profound.

I didn’t conquer her, he thought.

Not really. She gave it to me. She surrendered herself completely.

"Come here," Kai murmured.

He slowly lifted his hips, sliding his softening cock out from the warm valley of her ass cheeks. The loss of contact made Yun Xi shiver.

"You can lie on the bed," Kai told her gently.

And between her thighs, her swollen, deep pink pussy was a beautiful, ruined mess, slowly leaking a mixture of his thick white seed and her virgin blood onto her thighs.

It was perfect. All of it.

She looked down, her fingers nervously playing with the crumpled bedsheet. The bravado of the lust had faded, and the shy girl was returning, but with a new, lingering heat.

"Kai..." she started, her voice dropping to a whisper. "Can... can we sleep together? Umm... tonight?"

Kai paused, adjusting his stance. The logical part of his brain—the cultivator trying to survive—kicked in.

"You want me to sleep with you tonight?" Kai asked, running a hand through his hair. "But, you know... I have to go to my home, Yun Xi. My stepmother will ask questions if I don’t return."

Yun Xi’s shoulders instantly slumped. The radiant smile faltered, replaced by a shadow of her usual insecurity. She looked down at her lap, unable to meet his eyes.

"Oh... it’s already night, Kai," she murmured, trying to sound brave, though her voice wavered. "Never mind..."

She forced a small, sad chuckle, hugging her knees to her massive chest.

"Wear back your clothes, Kai. It... it was fun. We can do this again sometime." She squeezed her eyes shut for a second. "And... it’s a secret between us. Just like you promised."

She was putting her walls back up, preparing to be left alone in the mess he had made of her bed and her body.

Kai stood there in the quiet room. He looked at his discarded trousers on the floor. He should put them on. He should leave. He had his XP.

But then he looked at Yun Xi’s downcast face.

Kai slowly moved forward.

Yun Xi heard the creak of the floorboards. She looked up, expecting to see him dressed.

"K... Kai?" she stammered, her eyes going wide.

He didn’t stop. He climbed onto the mattress.

Before she could process what was happening, Kai fell forward, completely engulfing her. His large hands swept down to grab her bare, heavy ass cheeks, lifting her slightly as he pulled her plush, naked body flush against his hard, muscular frame.

He wrapped his arms around her tightly in a fierce, possessive hug, burying his face deep into the crook of her neck.

"Kai?" Yun Xi squeaked, completely paralyzed by the sudden, overwhelming intimacy.

"Sleep, Yun Xi," Kai murmured, his hot breath ghosting over her collarbone, sending a fresh wave of shivers down her spine. "You should rest. And also me... I am also very tired."

Yun Xi said nothing. She couldn’t.

She lay there, crushed against his chest, her massive breasts flattened perfectly against his torso. She stared straight up at the wooden ceiling, her eyes wide open behind her dirty glasses. The words stopped completely in her throat. He wasn’t leaving. The strong, dominant boy who had just ravaged her was now holding her like she was the most precious thing in the world.

Slowly, tentatively, her shock melted into a profound, overwhelming warmth.

She moved her hands. Her small fingers traced the hard muscles of his back, eventually resting between his shoulder blades. She slowly tilted her head down, resting her cheek against his messy black hair. She could hear his breathing evening out as he rested his face in her neck.

She closed her eyes, a fresh, happy tear slipping down her face. She squeezed her arms around him, hugging him as tight as she possibly could.

"Good night... Kai," she whispered into the quiet room, her heart completely and utterly his.
